sections.paragraph:
διεγρηγορέω (not found elsewhere; s. γρηγορέω) be awake P45 the ptc. διεγρηγορήσαντες Lk 9:32.—JBirdsall, JTS 14, ’63, 390f.

ptc. ptc. = participle

JTS JTS = Journal of Theological Studies—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 243
